name: Alton, Wm.
description: "Timberfoot" left a leg in France, but returned with all of his good nature. Bill is a most consistent oil-burner, and also addicted to tonsilitis, which he manages to contract at most opportune times.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Timberfoot" left a leg in France, but returned with all of his good nature. Bill is a most consistent oil-burner, and also addicted to tonsilitis, which he manages to contract at most opportune times.

name: Bryan, Jean Paul
description: "Barney Google" can get into more trouble in a day than the average man can in a week.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Barney Google" can get into more trouble in a day than the average man can in a week.

name: Burke, Stephen M. Jr.
description: "Steve" has been active, especially politically, since his debut at M. S. M. According to his time-honored opponents, "Field-Marshal" has an army of political specialists.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Steve" has been active, especially politically, since his debut at M. S. M. According to his time-honored opponents, "Field-Marshal" has an army of political specialists.

name: Brown, Paul MacF.
description: "Pap", sometimes known as "Little Joe" or "the meanest man in town," has a standing date with "Rudy" Kasel for frequent sallies among these hills looking for big bear.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Pap", sometimes known as "Little Joe" or "the meanest man in town," has a standing date with "Rudy" Kasel for frequent sallies among these hills looking for big bear.

name: Buser, Henry C.
description: H. C., the quiet and industrious chap from Webster Groves made one splash into Rollie's society, and the waves haven't stopped roaring yet.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: H. C., the quiet and industrious chap from Webster Groves made one splash into Rollie's society, and the waves haven't stopped roaring yet.

name: Campbell, E. Taylor
description: The polar bear came to us from out of the cold at the beginning of his Junior year. While here he gained fame at winter swimming.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The polar bear came to us from out of the cold at the beginning of his Junior year. While here he gained fame at winter swimming.

name: Dooley, Glen Angus
description: "Pluto" has always made his best grades in social lab, although he ranks rather high in baseball. Otherwise known as "Axel". Without him our student advisor's office would be a total failure. Admits he has the most efficient Ford in Rolla, 99.44 per cent pure.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Pluto" has always made his best grades in social lab, although he ranks rather high in baseball. Otherwise known as "Axel". Without him our student advisor's office would be a total failure. Admits he has the most efficient Ford in Rolla, 99.44 per cent pure.

name: E. L. Fipps
description: The boy from Salem—well, everybody knows him, so why write about him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The boy from Salem—well, everybody knows him, so why write about him.

name: Wayne Shannon Frame
description: One of the shining lights of the C. E. Department.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of the shining lights of the C. E. Department.

name: William P. Gatts
clubs: Local Sec. A. C. E., American Chemical Society
description: Bill spends part of his time defending the chemists, and the remainder of it admiring his mustache, which he claims is the best in the senior class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Bill spends part of his time defending the chemists, and the remainder of it admiring his mustache, which he claims is the best in the senior class.

name: D. G. Gibson
description: "Toughy" hails from Webster Groves, but is a good fellow in spite of that. The girls all fall for him, perhaps because of his curly hair.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Toughy" hails from Webster Groves, but is a good fellow in spite of that. The girls all fall for him, perhaps because of his curly hair.

name: Gordon, John P. Jr.
description: "Birdie" came here with ambition to be a city slicker. So far as we know, he still has the ambition.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Birdie" came here with ambition to be a city slicker. So far as we know, he still has the ambition.

name: Gregg, James L.
description: Jim is a gun in metallurgy, and is Thorny's left-hand man in the experiment station. He now has one steady job at least, namely, keeping the home fires burning.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Jim is a gun in metallurgy, and is Thorny's left-hand man in the experiment station. He now has one steady job at least, namely, keeping the home fires burning.

name: Ham, Neal M.
description: "Psuss" is considering joining the Traveling Men's Ass'n. He makes Rolla about once a week, but his headquarters are in Springfield.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Psuss" is considering joining the Traveling Men's Ass'n. He makes Rolla about once a week, but his headquarters are in Springfield.

name: Harris, G. G.
description: Real peppy puppy, who will some day be a rock hound.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Real peppy puppy, who will some day be a rock hound.

name: Hegwer, P. J.
description: Quiet, but a demon with one of Henry's Lizzies.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Quiet, but a demon with one of Henry's Lizzies.

name: Hoover, B. F.
description: "Herb" came to M. S. M. from the farm. He later began ploughing up Jackling field and did so well at it that Spike and the football coaches sent him to other schools who had fields to plough.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Herb" came to M. S. M. from the farm. He later began ploughing up Jackling field and did so well at it that Spike and the football coaches sent him to other schools who had fields to plough.

name: Hubbard, Henry G.
description: Slowest man in school, yet holds the record for the two-mile run. Introduced cross-country running at M. S. M.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Slowest man in school, yet holds the record for the two-mile run. Introduced cross-country running at M. S. M.

name: Healey, Michael V.
description: Lieut. M. V. Healey received a four-year furlough from the Air Service to take the Rolla Rest Cure—and incidentally a degree.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Lieut. M. V. Healey received a four-year furlough from the Air Service to take the Rolla Rest Cure—and incidentally a degree.

name: Huckins, Julian G.
description: "Skipper" spent most of his time arguing about the relative merits of the east and west coast navies, but he couldn't convince anyone. He also finds time to run into St. Louis for the week-end. After seeing the reason we can't blame him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Skipper" spent most of his time arguing about the relative merits of the east and west coast navies, but he couldn't convince anyone. He also finds time to run into St. Louis for the week-end. After seeing the reason we can't blame him.

name: Jewell, Armin Brene
description: "Abie" got E's without effort by sleeping near his books. Then the great disturbance—getting married, the movies and a dance, all entered his life as one thing. Now he sleeps no more.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Abie" got E's without effort by sleeping near his books. Then the great disturbance—getting married, the movies and a dance, all entered his life as one thing. Now he sleeps no more.

name: Joslin, Verne G.
description: How Verne managed to keep up his fussing and his school work at the same time is more than we can figure out. He had his future all laid out for him, so he didn't have to depend on his college education.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: How Verne managed to keep up his fussing and his school work at the same time is more than we can figure out. He had his future all laid out for him, so he didn't have to depend on his college education.

name: Kaley, Charles B.
description: "Chuck" spends more time reading the cheese market reports than he does in reading Peele. Never gets mad, but will air his views if he has to.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Chuck" spends more time reading the cheese market reports than he does in reading Peele. Never gets mad, but will air his views if he has to.

name: Kasel, Rudolph G.
description: A sea-going "gob" from Washington, Mo. Attitude towards life reflected in the expression "Come clean, Buster, come clean!"
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A sea-going "gob" from Washington, Mo. Attitude towards life reflected in the expression "Come clean, Buster, come clean!"

name: Keeling, Wm. Miller
description: After one year at William Jewell, Bill decided to be a Met. Bill would like to own a mustache, but it seems "she won't let him."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: After one year at William Jewell, Bill decided to be a Met. Bill would like to own a mustache, but it seems "she won't let him."

name: Lay, Willard C.
description: We all know Lay is conscientious, but have often wished that he would not try to raise the standard of the class by talking to the Profs after class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: We all know Lay is conscientious, but have often wished that he would not try to raise the standard of the class by talking to the Profs after class.

name: Lindgren, Roy Alex.
description: Roy claims the distinction of being the only man in Rolla to get six letters in the same day from the same girl. He left Rolla's four hundred, but it must have been just through modesty.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Roy claims the distinction of being the only man in Rolla to get six letters in the same day from the same girl. He left Rolla's four hundred, but it must have been just through modesty.

name: Martyn, P. F.
description: Spends most of his time in Cuba. Wonder why?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Spends most of his time in Cuba. Wonder why?

name: Marek, Harry C.
description: Harry hails from "Soo City." Says they have street cars there. Intended to specialize in geology, but soon found that his system did not contain enough, I presume.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Harry hails from "Soo City." Says they have street cars there. Intended to specialize in geology, but soon found that his system did not contain enough, I presume.

name: McAlpin, E. H.
description: Mack has been here two years and in that time set a record for fussing.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Mack has been here two years and in that time set a record for fussing.

name: Meeks, Felix Z.
motto: "Zolly is a steady ship on an ocean of Ozark Mule. When not cruising he lets Prof. Forbes help him put out mine surveying."
description: The Duke of nowhere. Doesn't mind spending a little money for pie if Boots is kept in a good humor. Stays in Rolla, but his heart is at K. U. What time is it, Slag-eye?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Zolly is a steady ship on an ocean of Ozark Mule. When not cruising he lets Prof. Forbes help him put out mine surveying."
The Duke of nowhere. Doesn't mind spending a little money for pie if Boots is kept in a good humor. Stays in Rolla, but his heart is at K. U. What time is it, Slag-eye?

name: Mosby, Donald Speed
motto: "Speed is the bulwark against which so many Sophs pit their strength in quantitative chemistry. Is naturally heartless and turns a deaf ear to passionate pleas of mercy when handing out repeats."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Speed is the bulwark against which so many Sophs pit their strength in quantitative chemistry. Is naturally heartless and turns a deaf ear to passionate pleas of mercy when handing out repeats."

name: Mulford, Frank C.
description: The owner of a misleading nickname, "Shorty". Almost joined the church at one time, but the competition was too strong and he lost her.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The owner of a misleading nickname, "Shorty". Almost joined the church at one time, but the competition was too strong and he lost her.

name: Murphy, Raymond E.
description: No, you're mistaken. He's an Irishman, and furthermore a theologian—the latter by inclination, if ye plaze.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: No, you're mistaken. He's an Irishman, and furthermore a theologian—the latter by inclination, if ye plaze.

name: Owens, I. K.
description: "Hank" proved himself to be one of our hardest hitting backfield men in his two years of gridiron work; but in his second season he took the "big step," and also received a serious injury.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Hank" proved himself to be one of our hardest hitting backfield men in his two years of gridiron work; but in his second season he took the "big step," and also received a serious injury.

name: Parkhurst, A. B.
description: "Babe" has given three years of hard work on the varsity football line, and we are sorry to let him go back to the dark interior of Oklahoma from which we brought him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Babe" has given three years of hard work on the varsity football line, and we are sorry to let him go back to the dark interior of Oklahoma from which we brought him.

name: Pence, Harry Simanton
clubs: A. I. M. E. & M. E.
description: Harry is a man of good common sense and his opinion is respected. He grows a wonderful mustache.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Harry is a man of good common sense and his opinion is respected. He grows a wonderful mustache.

name: Pesout, Edward
description: It is quoted by those who made the Junior trip to Butte, Montana, that the Butte and Superior Company dispensed with all telephones in their mines as Eddie with his famous line was quite capable of handling the job.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: It is quoted by those who made the Junior trip to Butte, Montana, that the Butte and Superior Company dispensed with all telephones in their mines as Eddie with his famous line was quite capable of handling the job.

name: Powers, H. R.
motto: "Don't cry, little girl, I'll teach you to love me."
description: "Windy" by name and nature. Author of the famous statement "Don't cry, little girl, I'll teach you to love me."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Don't cry, little girl, I'll teach you to love me."
"Windy" by name and nature. Author of the famous statement "Don't cry, little girl, I'll teach you to love me."

name: Reeves, John Milton
description: Reeves, alias "Chester Gump," the greatest impromptu speaker in M. S. M. Can tell in advance how much you will lose at bridge.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Reeves, alias "Chester Gump," the greatest impromptu speaker in M. S. M. Can tell in advance how much you will lose at bridge.

name: Remmers, W. E.
description: "Wallie" is one of the "guns" of the Met Department, and also acts as Boots Clayton's orderly on various occasions.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Wallie" is one of the "guns" of the Met Department, and also acts as Boots Clayton's orderly on various occasions.

name: Schmidt, Karl August
description: Widely known in mining circles, especially in Butte and Jerome. Wore out at least three muck-sticks by leaning on them.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Widely known in mining circles, especially in Butte and Jerome. Wore out at least three muck-sticks by leaning on them.

name: Thomy, Lawrence
description: Is a charter member of the "K. K." Explored Frisco Pond in his youth.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is a charter member of the "K. K." Explored Frisco Pond in his youth.

name: Ten Eyck, Warren E.
description: Although his folks live at St. James, has spent most of his time in the Golden State, and says he will spend more there as soon as possible.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Although his folks live at St. James, has spent most of his time in the Golden State, and says he will spend more there as soon as possible.

name: Teter, W. Earl
description: Say, Earl, are you a Gallagher II? If not, how do you account for your cutting that poor little grass widow whom you endeared to our hearts?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Say, Earl, are you a Gallagher II? If not, how do you account for your cutting that poor little grass widow whom you endeared to our hearts?

name: Tevis, Charles C.
description: After four years Charlie still maintains that anyone can make a living as a C. E. One of the best athletics boosters M. S. M. has ever had.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: After four years Charlie still maintains that anyone can make a living as a C. E. One of the best athletics boosters M. S. M. has ever had.

name: Tragitt, Edmund R.
description: One of Rollie's favorite sons and therefore needs no introduction.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of Rollie's favorite sons and therefore needs no introduction.

name: Walsh, David Francis
description: "OUR Dave." A solemn and wise one withal. Will talk on the slightest provocation. Known to have taken a few courses in 'Met' and 'Chem'.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "OUR Dave." A solemn and wise one withal. Will talk on the slightest provocation. Known to have taken a few courses in 'Met' and 'Chem'.

name: Wanenmacher, Joe
description: Joe found an M. S. M. Catalog in an empty boxcar at Steubenville, Ohio, and decided that nothing could be worse. Since then he has lived and learned.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Joe found an M. S. M. Catalog in an empty boxcar at Steubenville, Ohio, and decided that nothing could be worse. Since then he has lived and learned.

name: Webster, Vance H.
description: "Webby" is quite a boy and comes from Indiana. Hangs out in the library where he will find you anything but the latest copy of the "Police Gazette."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Webby" is quite a boy and comes from Indiana. Hangs out in the library where he will find you anything but the latest copy of the "Police Gazette."

name: Watkins, Marion W.
description: Known in Memphis as "Mamie", in Rolla as "Hoss Collar." Has been known to spend as much as sixteen dollars.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Known in Memphis as "Mamie", in Rolla as "Hoss Collar." Has been known to spend as much as sixteen dollars.

name: Weigel, Melvin Powell
description: "Willie" is the terror of the freshman chemistry classes. He is reputed to have had a serious case with a "black-headed woman" some time in the past.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Willie" is the terror of the freshman chemistry classes. He is reputed to have had a serious case with a "black-headed woman" some time in the past.

name: Walter, A. Werner
description: "Student Assistant Werner"—oh, what a terror to the poor C. E. Frosh—yes, and even some Juniors.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Student Assistant Werner"—oh, what a terror to the poor C. E. Frosh—yes, and even some Juniors.

name: Zeller, George A.
description: Zeller, so named from the delicate tint of his tootsies. Makes frequent and productive raids on the vineyards of St. James and vicinity. is a veteran of many hard fought love affairs, but these battles are never fought to the end, for he always sees some other girl at just the critical time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Zeller, so named from the delicate tint of his tootsies. Makes frequent and productive raids on the vineyards of St. James and vicinity. is a veteran of many hard fought love affairs, but these battles are never fought to the end, for he always sees some other girl at just the critical time.

name: Zevallos, Robert C.
description: "Bob" traveled some distance to get a social as well as scholastic education.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bob" traveled some distance to get a social as well as scholastic education.

name: Zoller, Henry Eugene
description: gets 'em young, treats 'em rough, and tells 'em nothing.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: gets 'em young, treats 'em rough, and tells 'em nothing.

name: Zook, Samuel I.
description: "Sam" spends most of his time waiting for the mail man. He takes a great interest in letters postmarked Des Moines.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Sam" spends most of his time waiting for the mail man. He takes a great interest in letters postmarked Des Moines.

name: Zimmerman, Desiderius
motto: "A gun of high power, who doesn't look it. Calculus is his specialty.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "A gun of high power, who doesn't look it. Calculus is his specialty.
